title: Volume Split Tracker Playbook
description: Track call offered, answered, abandoned per segment and fiscal week. Surface mix shifts before staffing debates.

mindset.principle: Aggregate volume lies. Segments tell the truth.

mistakes.label: Report company-wide calls only
mistakes.cost: Miss segment surge that breaks one ASA goal

decision_branches.situation: Total flat but one segment moves

agent_signal.use_when: Call volume debated without segment split. Mix shift suspected. Forecast needs actuals by queue family.
decision_criteria: Log offered, answered, abandoned per segment weekly.
Flag mix shift when one segment moves >10% vs 4-week avg.
Feed actuals into forecast variance pack.
agent_signal.operator_context: Segment truth prevents wrong staffing on the wrong queue.
agent_signal.not_for: Generic ops: fetch only when use_when matches; do not replace spine chain packs.
trigger_phrases: Call volume debated without segment split. Mix shift suspected. Forecast needs actuals by queue family.
Need playbook: Volume Split Tracker Playbook
